commit_summaries.message:
tools: Update pillow to 12.2.0

pillow==12.2.0 fixes CVE-2026-40192

Signed-off-by: Jan Gałda <jan.galda@nordicsemi.no>

tools: Update cryptography to 46.0.7

cryptography==46.0.7 fixes CVE-2026-39892 and CVE-2026-34073

Signed-off-by: Jan Gałda <jan.galda@nordicsemi.no>

tools: Update ecdsa to 0.19.2

ecdsa==0.19.2 fixes CVE-2026-33936

Signed-off-by: Jan Gałda <jan.galda@nordicsemi.no>

tools: Update pygments to 2.20.0

pygments==2.20.0 fixes CVE-2026-4539

Signed-off-by: Jan Gałda <jan.galda@nordicsemi.no>

tools: Update requests to 2.33.1

requests==2.33.1 fixes CVE-2026-25645

Signed-off-by: Jan Gałda <jan.galda@nordicsemi.no>
